auth.title: Sign in to Tutora Admin
auth.subtitle: Use your administrator Google account to continue.
auth.adminOnly: Access is restricted to Tutora administrators.
auth.googleLoadError: Couldn’t load Google sign-in. Please try again.

errors.not_authorized: This account doesn’t have admin access.
errors.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage tutors, students, and content across Tutora.

signups.title: New signups
signups.description: New students and tutors over the last 30 days.

tutorStatus.title: Tutors by verification
tutorStatus.description: Verification status across all tutor profiles.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: You don’t have permission to view this page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Search, review, and manage students, tutors, and admins.

edit.title: Edit user
edit.name: Name
edit.error: Couldn’t save changes. Please try again.

create.title: Add user
create.subtitle: Provision an account by email. It links on first Google sign-in.
create.name: Name
create.error: Couldn’t create the user. Please try again.

restore.title: Restore user?
restore.description: {{name}} will regain access to their account.

users.lifecycleError: Couldn’t complete the action. Please try again.

verifications.title: Verifications
verifications.subtitle: Review tutor identity and certificates.

confirm.verifyDescription: The tutor will be marked verified and can be published.
confirm.rejectDescription: The tutor will be rejected and unpublished from search.
confirm.rejectCertDescription: The certificate will be rejected. The tutor can re-upload a corrected file.

reject.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this tutor is being rejected.
reject.certReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this certificate is being rejected.
reject.reasonRequired: A reason is required to reject.

verifications.error: Couldn’t complete the action. Please try again.

reviews.title: Reviews & reports
reviews.subtitle: Moderate reviews and resolve abuse or spam reports.

moderate.title: Moderate review
moderate.subtitle: Set this review’s visibility. Hidden and removed reviews don’t count toward the tutor’s rating.
moderate.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this review is hidden or removed.
moderate.reasonRequired: A reason is required when hiding or removing a review.
moderate.error: Couldn’t moderate the review. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Compose and send a push notification to an audience segment.

form.bodyPlaceholder: Write the notification your audience will receive…

audienceHint.ALL: Reaches every active student and tutor.

confirm.title: Send this notification?
confirm.description: This sends the notification to {{audience}} immediately. It can’t be undone.

result.empty: No users matched this segment — nothing was sent.

notifications.error: Couldn’t send the notification. Please try again.

taxonomy.title: Taxonomy
taxonomy.subtitle: Manage categories, subjects, districts, and languages.

form.subtitle: Names appear in the app; slugs and codes must be unique.
form.name: Name
form.invalidSlug: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
form.invalidCode: Use 2–10 lowercase letters (e.g. az, en, ru).
form.error: Couldn’t save. The slug or code may already be in use.

delete.title: Delete this item?
delete.description: “{{name}}” will be removed. This can’t be undone.
delete.error: Couldn’t delete. It may still be in use.

payments.title: Payments & plans
payments.subtitle: Manage subscription plans, oversee subscriptions, and reconcile transactions.

planForm.allTiersUsed: Every tier already has a plan.
planForm.subtitle: A plan sets a tier’s price and the capabilities it unlocks.
planForm.name: Name
planForm.priceInvalid: Enter a valid amount (at most two decimals).
planForm.limitInvalid: Enter a whole number (0 or more).
planForm.error: Couldn’t save the plan. Please try again.

reconcile.title: Reconcile payment
reconcile.subtitle: Move the payment to a settled state. A refund can’t be undone.
reconcile.terminal: This payment is in a final state and can’t change.
reconcile.error: Couldn’t update the payment. Please try again.

settings.title: Feature flags & settings
settings.subtitle: Toggle features, tune progressive rollout, and manage global configuration.

flagForm.subtitle: Enable a capability and roll it out to a share of the audience.
flagForm.keyInvalid: Use a lowercase key: letters, numbers, and underscores.
flagForm.rolloutInvalid: Enter a whole number between 0 and 100.
flagForm.error: Couldn’t save the flag. The key may already be in use.

flagDelete.title: Delete this flag?
flagDelete.description: “{{key}}” will be removed. This can’t be undone.
flagDelete.error: Couldn’t delete the flag. Please try again.

settingForm.subtitle: Store a global configuration value as JSON.
settingForm.keyInvalid: Use a lowercase key: letters, numbers, and underscores.
settingForm.valueHint: Any JSON value — quote strings, e.g. "support@tutora.app".
settingForm.error: Couldn’t save the setting. The key may already be in use.

settingDelete.title: Delete this setting?
settingDelete.description: “{{key}}” will be removed. This can’t be undone.
settingDelete.error: Couldn’t delete the setting. Please try again.

logs.title: Audit logs
logs.subtitle: Review privileged actions and security-relevant events.

cms.title: Content
cms.subtitle: Manage landing sections, FAQ entries, and blog posts served to the marketing site.

form.subtitle: Landing sections, FAQ, and blog posts are localized — one entry per language.
form.title: Title
form.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
form.error: Couldn’t save the content. The slug may already be in use for this language.

delete.title: Delete this content?
delete.description: “{{title}}” will be removed. This can’t be undone.
delete.error: Couldn’t delete the content. Please try again.

translations.title: Translations
translations.subtitle: Manage over-the-air translation keys and their copy in each language.

form.subtitle: A key is grouped by namespace; fill its copy in each language.
form.namespaceInvalid: Use a single word: letters and numbers, starting with a letter.
form.keyInvalid: Use dot-separated segments (letters, numbers, dots and underscores).
form.error: Couldn’t save the translation. The key may already exist in this namespace.

delete.title: Delete this key?
delete.description: “{{key}}” will be removed. This can’t be undone.
delete.error: Couldn’t delete the key. Please try again.

rbac.title: Roles & permissions
rbac.subtitle: Review what each role can do across the admin panel.
rbac.assignmentHint: The admin panel is restricted to administrators. Assign a member’s role in the Users section.

roleDescriptions.ADMIN: Full access to every admin capability.
roleDescriptions.TUTOR: Tutor app access; no admin panel capabilities.
roleDescriptions.STUDENT: Student app access; no admin panel capabilities.
